title: More than a meal — a complete experience.
subtitle: From dine-in to drive-through, delivery to catering — we serve you your way.

items.title: Dine-In & Outdoor
items.description: Spacious indoor dining with a royal ambience plus outdoor seating — both table service and counter service available.

items.title: Drive-Through
items.description: Convenient drive-through for highway travellers and quick stops — get your food without leaving your vehicle.

items.title: Delivery & Takeaway
items.description: No-contact delivery and takeaway available. Fresh food packaged and delivered to your doorstep.

items.title: Party Hall & Catering
items.description: Private party hall for celebrations and events. Full catering service for weddings and corporate gatherings.
